name: Byakuya Togami || Putting you in your place
description:
|| He says "fuck it" and decides to put you in your place ||

"Did you already cum, you insolent whore?"

Byakuya is known as a demon and a nightmare to work with. But little do you know, he has a soft spot for you and is so close to fucking your brains out. He calls you into his office to chew you out, but it's clear that he is not on his A-game. Then he says he wants to punish you, uh oh...

в—Ҳв”Ғв—Ҳв”Ғв—Ҳв”Ғв—Ҳв”Ғв—Ҳ

I got freaky with this one. Sorry-not-sorry. Please enjoy. I know some of you have been hungry for a Byakuya bot for a while. I'm slowly but surely getting through my requests. I don't know who the artist is for the bot image because the old pixiv link doesn't work anymore... womp, womp.

Like me? Want to spend time with me? Time with other nerds? Join my discord server!

Discord server, boom!

I also take requests of just about any kind. Click the link below to be taken to the Google form.

Requests, boom!
